name: SANNO Co., Ltd.
summary: SANNO Co., Ltd. engages in the precious metal surface treatment of electronic parts with the focus on connectors in Japan. The company's products are used in PC related products, mobile handsets, digital appliances, electronic cards, semiconductor facilities, gaming devices, automobile devices, and other devices. SANNO Co., Ltd. was founded in 1958 and is based in Yokohama, Japan.
